'''''Red Fang''''' was a modified [[A-24 Sleuth-class scout ship|A-24 ''Sleuth''-class scout ship]] owned by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Tarquin Zian]]. ''Red Fang'' was armed with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. The crew was simply Zian himself, although the ship allowed two more passengers. Zian used this ship to take some [[Kallistan gem]]s offered by [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]] in exchange for transporting weapons for Rinn's coup against [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Linrec]].

During the same time, Zian also used the ship to take bounty hunter [[Demos Traxen]] to [[Kallistas]], where he hoped to capture [[Pallas Quintell]]; unfortunately, Zian spent a time "avoiding [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] entanglements" during the trip and, once they arrived, Quintell had been already captured by other [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].
